title: Risk-on unmodified sizing lift
hypothesis: Plain risk-on signals with no other sizing modifier deserve 1.25x risk.
single_causal_variable: risk_on + no existing sizing modifier risk multiplier
acceptance: Three fixed windows improved EV; aggregate PnL +8.49%; no trade count or win-rate change.
production_parity: Implemented in shared portfolio_engine sizing and covered by test_production_parity.
next_retry_requires: Forward evidence or tail-risk metric before raising above 1.25x.
